title: petrorhagia prolifera subsp. nanteuilii
intro: Petrorhagia prolifera subsp. nanteuilii, also known as Nanteuil's pink, is a perennial plant species of the Caryophyllaceae family, native to southern Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, digestive problems, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Petrorhagia prolifera subsp. nanteuilii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
